pageContext.name: Zim Zippermouth
pageContext.description: Why Don't You Bow Down To Me or Something?  Irkens are expected to be unwaveringly loyal to the Empire, but Zim of Nickelodeon's Invader Zim, is loyal to the point of absurdity. A narcissist and megalomaniac, he is blind to his many, many failures.   Our 10-inch tall Zim Zippermouth™ Premium Plush features his green Irk skin and the standard-issue Invader uniform: a striped red tunic with pink collar and sleeves, as well as black leggings, boots, and gloves. Pay special attention to the position of his antennae because they only droop while he schmoops . Unzip his mouth, and a worm-like tongue is revealed.  Like all of our Zippermouths™, Zim is a sculptural plush. He's stitched with great precision using top-quality materials and designed to hold his shape no matter what self-inflicted disaster awaits him.  Pair him up with his disguised robot companion, our Gir Zippermouth™. But be advised, they are likely plotting the end of human civilization as we know it.
